Motion To Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Apr-19-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Sean Ellis, Esq., appearing for plaintiff.
Plaintiff's Motion to Restore Action Dismissed is heard this day. After argument of counsel court ordered motion granted without prejudice to further motions by defendant. Motion is granted subject to payment of sanctions pending in this case. Counsel to prepare an order. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee. (212).

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice pursuant to CCP 583.250 for failure to comply with CCP583.210. Proceedings reported by Beldon Yee, CSR #2647. (212)
